description:
## What

Two new pages that deliver the Lighthouse for Web Components value proposition — compare your library against others and against industry leaders.

## Deliverables

1. **Compare page** (apps/admin/src/app/compare/page.tsx):
   - Library selector: pick 2-4 libraries from your registry
   - Side-by-side score comparison table or radar chart
   - Per-dimension breakdown showing where each library excels or lags
   - Component count, average score, grade distribution per library
   - Winner callouts per category (best API docs, best a11y, best CEM completeness)

2. **Benchmark page** (apps/admin/src/app/benchmark/page.tsx):
   - Pre-configured CDN entries for major WC libraries: Shoelace, Spectrum Web Components, Carbon, Lion, Material Web, Ionic, PatternFly, Vaadin, FluentUI
   - Benchmark My Library — select your library, select 1-3 industry libraries to compare against
   - Results show percentile ranking across dimensions
   - Actionable insights: where you lag behind leaders and what they document that you do not

3. **benchmark-presets.ts** (apps/admin/src/lib) — Pre-configured CDN library entries with known package names and prefixes for the industry leaders listed above

## Acceptance Criteria

- Comparison works between local and CDN libraries in the same view
- Scoring tier differences clearly indicated (full vs CEM-only)
- Industry benchmark page works with zero configuration — just pick your library and go
- Graceful handling when CDN resolution fails (rate limit, package not found, no CEM at root)
- TypeScript compiles with zero errors
title: M4: Cross-Library Comparison & Industry Benchmark Pages

2. **Benchmark page** (apps/admin/src/app/benchmark/page.tsx):
